# include autogenerated source for proper platform.
if(DARWIN_X86_64)
  include(darwin_x86_64.cmake)
elseif(DARWIN_AARCH64)
  include(darwin_aarch64.cmake)
elseif(LINUX_X86_64)
  include(linux_x86_64.cmake)
elseif(LINUX_AARCH64)
  include(linux_aarch64.cmake)
elseif(WINDOWS_MSVC_X86_64)
  include(windows_x86_64.cmake)
endif()

# Setup tests for ctest.
set(WEBRTC_TESTS
    webrtc_common_audio_common_audio_unittests webrtc_media_rtc_media_unittests
    webrtc_modules_audio_coding_audio_decoder_unittests
    webrtc_pc_peerconnection_unittests webrtc_pc_rtc_pc_unittests)

foreach(TEST ${WEBRTC_TESTS})
  add_test(
    NAME ${TEST}
    COMMAND
      $<TARGET_FILE:${TEST}> --gtest_output=xml:$<TARGET_FILE_NAME:${TEST}>.xml
      --gtest_catch_exceptions=0
    WORKING_DIRECTORY $<TARGET_FILE_DIR:${TEST}>)
endforeach(TEST WEBRTC_TESTS)
